description: Style Note Elegant and bright casual wear with a flattering Fit and impressive styling is definitely Tonga's forte. This top from Tonga is a definite must for the update of your summer monsoon wardrobe. Keep it stylish and simple by pairing up this trendy top with flats and jeggings or light coloured jeans. We like to describe this look as charmingly casual! Product Details Black lacy top with a solid pink sleeveless inner attached at the neckline and the hemline, has grown-on laced batwing sleeves, a round neck and a broad elasticised hem Material and Care 100% nylon Hand wash cold Do not bleach Flat dry Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
